ref.description: Name of the Sync resource to reference.

with.description: Template variables passed to the Sync resource for argument interpolation.

description: Spec for `kind: Origin`. References an external project (e.g. dbt) to auto-generate Assets.

connection.description: Connection resource name for auto-generated Sources.

defaultSync.description: Applied to all auto-generated Assets unless overridden.

projectDir.description: Local path to the dbt project directory (relative or absolute).

title: OriginSpec
